source_text: If the upper support member is further than 100 mm above the Upper Side Impact member, then properly Triangulated bracing is required to transfer load to the Main Hoop by one of: - the Upper Side Impact member - an additional member transmitting load from the junction of the Upper Support Member with the Front Hoop c
requirement_text_pred: If the upper support member is further than 100 mm above the Upper Side Impact member, then properly Triangulated bracing is required to transfer load to the Main Hoop by the Upper Side Impact member

prediction.subject: properly Triangulated bracing
prediction.condition: If the upper support member is further than 100 mm above the Upper Side Impact member, then
prediction.action: required to transfer load to the Main Hoop by the Upper Side Impact member

notes: The requirement text includes an 'if-then' statement, but the prediction only captures part of the conditional logic. The action and object in the prediction do not fully reflect the original requirement, which specifies that bracing is required if the upper support member is further than 100 mm above the Upper Side Impact member, and that the load transfer can be achieved by either the Upper Side Impact member or an additional member. The prediction misses the alternative condition for load transfer and does not capture the full scope of the requirement.
